problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
